source_clip_origin: publicly available Czech hockey highlight, YouTube search 'tipsport extraliga sestrih', first 30s sample, 640x360 broadcast quality
disclaimer: Pretrained model na COCO, ne na hockey domain. Detections jsou proxy: 'person' class = skater/referee. Puk je často moc malý a rychlý pro pretrained 'sports ball' class. Pro produkční hockey detector by se model fine-tunoval na annotated hockey frame set.
